data.title: HelloNation Article Featuring Expert Veterinarian Dr. Annie Bowes Discusses How Often Pets Should Have Regular Checkups
data.description: An article discusses the importance of regular checkups, preventative care, and wellness exams in ensuring the long-term health of pets. It raises the question of how frequently pet owners should schedule checkups to maintain their animals' well-being. The article is from Post Falls, Idaho and was released on April 16, 2026 via PRNewswire. The publication provides valuable insights on pet care schedules and emphasizes the significance of these practices in preserving the health of pets in the long run.

data.title: Aledade Selected for CMS ACCESS Model to Expand Tech-Enabled Chronic Care Support
data.description: A healthcare company based in Bethesda, Maryland, Aledade, revealed today that its participation in the ACCESS model has been approved by the Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services.
Money market fund assets drop to $7.64 trln, sinking by $175.81 bln, the most on record at ICI

data.title: EquityProtect Launches First National Scorecard Tracking State Protections Against Deed Theft
data.description: EquityProtect has introduced the Property Protection Scorecard, a quarterly report that monitors property title fraud legislation throughout the United States. The scorecard aims to provide insights into the current state of property protection laws, covering all fifty states. This initiative is designed to offer a comprehensive view of efforts to combat title fraud and ensure the security of property ownership.

data.title: Q1 2026 saw public crypto miners sell higher BTC than entire 2025. Some liquidate for expenses, others hold for growth.
data.description: Some mining firms are currently divided in their approach to Bitcoin, with a portion selling the cryptocurrency to meet operational costs, while others are choosing to retain their Bitcoin reserves for potential future expansion.

data.title: The 17th China Children’s Film Dubbing Promotion and Exhibition Event Officially Kicks Off
data.description: On April 9th, in Beijing, an event was held to honor the revolutionary legacy and celebrate significant moments in history. The event, organized by the Publicity Department of the CPC Beijing Committee, the China National Film Museum, the China Film Association, and the China Children’s Film Association, highlighted the importance of children's growth and education. This public welfare initiative has been dedicated to children for sixteen years. The event featured children's voices and showcased the collaboration between these organizations to promote this cause.

data.title: ZoomInfo Ranks No. 1 in 142 G2 Spring 2026 Reports Across Sales Intelligence, Buyer Intent Data, and Lead Capture
data.description: In Vancouver, Washington, ZoomInfo (NASDAQ: GTM) has achieved notable recognition as the top-ranking company in 142 reports within G2's Spring 2026 Market Reports. Additionally, the company has been identified as a leader in over 400 reports in total. G2, a renowned software marketplace, assesses products using verified customer reviews and market presence information. ZoomInfo's success spans various categories, including Sales Intelligence Software, solidifying its position as a prominent player in the industry.

data.title: Uplynk Announces Strong Operating Performance and Accelerated Product Innovation
data.description: Based in Wilmington, Delaware, Uplynk, a cloud-native streaming platform designed for broadcast-quality video on a large scale, recently reported significant progress and a faster rate of innovation. Drawing on nearly twenty years of experience catering to the live, linear, and on-demand sectors, Uplynk's offerings focus on reliability, operational oversight, and responsibility. The platform caters to demanding environments where errors are not tolerated. This update underscores Uplynk's commitment to providing top-notch services in the streaming industry.

data.title: Service Corporation International Announces Schedule For First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Service Corporation International (NYSE: SCI) shared plans to release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on April 29, 2026. The company will be hosting a conference call led by SCI Management on April 30th. This announcement was made in Houston.

data.title: Eagle Hill Consulting Earns Prestigious USA Today Top Workplace Award
data.description: A company based in Arlington, Virginia, Eagle Hill Consulting, has been awarded the prestigious 2026 USA TODAY Top Workplaces award in the category of 150–499 employees. This achievement adds to Eagle Hill's collection of Top Workplaces recognitions, all of which are solely determined by feedback from employees.

data.title: GO BOWLING AT THE GLEN NASCAR RACE REVS UP MOTHER'S DAY WEEKEND
data.description: A racing event, the Go Bowling at the Glen NASCAR Cup Series race, will take place in Arlington, Texas, over Mother's Day weekend starting on April 16, 2026. The event, organized by Go Bowling, will combine a celebration of mothers, bowling, and auto racing. This high-speed race weekend will feature thrilling NASCAR Cup Series action, highlighting the intersection of these popular interests. The event aims to attract a wide audience, bringing together fans of various interests to enjoy the adrenaline-pumping experience.

data.title: American Council of Learned Societies Awards 2026 ACLS Fellowships
data.description: A total of $3.5 million has been granted to 63 scholars in recognition of their outstanding research in humanities and social sciences. The American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS) has revealed the recipients of the 2026 ACLS Fellows. This year marks the ACLS's centennial anniversary in grantmaking, highlighting its longstanding commitment to supporting academic excellence.

data.title: CIOs Struggle to Deliver Business Value as AI and Complexity Expose Gaps in Their Applications Strategy, Says Info-Tech Research Group
data.description: The rapid adoption of AI technology, along with escalating cybersecurity threats and growing operational complexity, is causing significant disruption to organizations. A large number of businesses are lacking a clear strategy to effectively tackle these challenges within their application practices. Recent research conducted by Info-Tech Research Group reveals alarming statistics, highlighting the urgency of addressing these issues.

data.title: SkillBit Platform Selected to Power the 2026 International Cybersecurity Challenge
data.description: A global cyber competition is scheduled to take place on SkillBit's interactive training and evaluation platform at AUSCERT 2026. The event will be hosted in Charlottesville, Virginia. SkillBit, renowned for its hands-on cybersecurity training and skill enhancement, revealed that its platform will be utilized for this competition. The news was released on April 16, 2026.

data.title: North Texas Lands Trua Senior Living Locators Franchise
data.description: Trua, a franchise specializing in assisting families to discover suitable senior living arrangements for their elderly relatives, has initiated operations in North Texas on April 14, 2026. The company introduced Chad as the newest franchise owner in the region.
